name: Crunchy French Toast (Star 11/23/92)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the egg, milk, sugar, and cinnamon.
2. Mix the flaked coconut and crushed cornflakes in another bowl.
3. Heat the butter in a skillet over medium heat.
4. Dip each slice of bread into the egg mixture, then coat with the corn flakes mixture.
5. Place the coated bread slices in the skillet and brown on both sides until light golden. Turn once during cooking.
6. Serve with maple syrup.
